faqs.a: Product pages that feature customer videos and images convert higher because they provide "social proof" of the products effectiveness. The most dramatic conversion spikes, in some cases up to around 100% lift, occur when a customer doesn't just see the content but interacts with it (e.g. clicks and watches it). This incremental conversion spike is what justifies paying an Onsite Commission to the creator. In addition to direct conversion lift ecommerce websites featuring UGC galleries see an increase in session duration, reduced returns and higher revenue per visitor.

An Onsite Commission refers to earnings that a UGC creator makes when their video content results in a qualifying purchase transaction after being clicked and watched from your site. Onsite Commissions are separate from affiliate commissions that creators earn through off site referrals for sharing content in social media or other online channels.

faqs.q: How do creators feel about Onsite Commissions?
faqs.a: Creators love passive income opportunities from their content. They also love the additional exposure and followers they can get when their content, name and likeness appears onsite. While Onsite Commissions are typically much lower than offsite referral commissions they understand its justified because they get "free" traffic.

faqs.q: How do you track Onsite Commissions?
faqs.a: We have an SDK that installs with a single line of code and connects to virtually any video player and checkout engine to report playbacks and purchases which we then use to calculate and pay commissions to creators based on your attribution model and commission rate.

faqs.q: Can I set my attribution model and commission rate?
faqs.a: With our Onsite Commission Engine you will have complete control over what you pay creators and when you pay it. For example you can set what qualifies as a creator video view, the attribution window for qualifying a purchase and the commission rate you pay to creators after a qualifying purchase is made.

faqs.q: Can I use my current affiliate platform for Onsite Commissions?
faqs.a: Because all major affiliate platforms have tracking that is based on referral direct linking they can't support Onsite Commissions. Since onsite videos are embedded on your site there is no direct link (e.g. referral link click) for the affiliate platform to track. In fact, most affiliate platforms specifically exclude internal linking since they only pay commissions for external referrals.

We offer a fully managed and automated Onsite Commissions solution that integrates with your existing stack so that you don't have to write tons of new code to launch and scale an onsite commission program. No matter where you are at in your journey to launching and scaling an Onsite Commission program we can help you!

You already have a creator platform and onsite video player - now all you need is an engine to scale it to every product page on your site. Unlike traditional affiliate and UGC platforms and agencies we provide a complete Onsite Commission solution that enables you to scale your results because you only pay UGC creators for their content after it provides an incremental conversion result.

We charge proportionally for the incremental sales we help create, not just for software. After an initial consultation, we'll provide a transparent quote with no hidden costs. You will always have full control and transparency over your Onsite Commission program.

faqs.q: What's it like to work with you?
faqs.a: We are the foremost experts in affiliate and creator marketing and have worked with brands like Amazon, Lowe's, lululemon, Wayfair, Etsy and many others. We obsess over performance outcomes and our customers satisfaction with our results. We are always online and responsive to our customers needs.
